title: Encore API Endpoint
description: Schema describing an Encore api() / //encore:api endpoint declaration as parsed by Encore.ts or Encore.go.

name.description: Endpoint name as declared in source.

service.description: Name of the Encore service this endpoint belongs to.

expose.description: If true, endpoint is reachable from outside the Encore application (public).

auth.description: If true, Encore requires a valid auth context before invoking the endpoint.

sensitive.description: If true, request and response payloads are redacted in traces.

raw.description: If true, declared via api.raw() — receives request and response writer directly.

streaming.description: If true, endpoint is a streaming/WebSocket endpoint.

request_schema.description: JSON Schema derived from the declared TypeScript request interface or Go struct.

response_schema.description: JSON Schema derived from the declared TypeScript response interface or Go struct.
